title: Unique Seattle Wedding and Event Venues
content: # The Point at Pier 70 Event Venue. ## The Next Chapter of Seattle’s Waterfront Begins Here. Perched on the edge of historic Pier 70, The Point offers panoramic views of Elliott Bay, the Olympics, and the city skyline. Once the set of MTV’s The Real World, this storied waterfront landmark is now a premier event space managed by Landmark Event Co. Our event and catering services are routinely recognized as the best in the city. A large building stands next to a pier, showcasing a blend of architecture and waterfront scenery. join the many others that have celebrated at The Point at pier 70. Award winning catering, flawless planning, audio visual, entertainment, florals, transportation, valet and more – we can plan and handle all the details giving you a seamless event. Book a private tour at your convenience to experience our venue firsthand and imagine your special event with us.
